---
title: "SLN10: Autoinit/Autodeinit Pattern"
subtitle: "Centralized Initialization and Cleanup for Scripts"
category: "solution"
number: "SLN10"
part: "part2"
chapter: "CH18"
date-created: "2025-12-14"
date-modified: "2025-12-14"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    number-sections: true
---

## Issue

Scripts (ETL, DRV, update scripts) need consistent environment initialization and cleanup across different execution contexts:

- **RStudio**: `.Rprofile` auto-loads
- **Rscript**: `.Rprofile` does NOT load
- **{targets} pipeline**: `.Rprofile` does NOT load

Without proper initialization, scripts may fail due to missing path constants, database connections, or configuration.

## Root Cause

R's `.Rprofile` only auto-executes in interactive sessions (RStudio, R console). When scripts are executed via `Rscript` command or through pipeline tools like `{targets}`, the `.Rprofile` is bypassed, leaving the environment uninitialized.

## Solution

### Core Implementation

The `autoinit()`/`autodeinit()` functions are defined in:

```
scripts/global_scripts/22_initializations/sc_Rprofile.R
```

### Usage Pattern

Every DRV/ETL script MUST explicitly source and call these functions:

```r
# PART 1: INITIALIZE
source("scripts/global_scripts/22_initializations/sc_Rprofile.R")
autoinit()

# ... script logic (PART 2-4) ...

# PART 5: DEINITIALIZE
autodeinit()  # MUST be LAST statement
```

## What autoinit() Does

```r
autoinit <- function() {
  # 1. Detect Operation Mode
  OPERATION_MODE <- get_mode(detect_script_path())
  # Returns: UPDATE_MODE, GLOBAL_MODE, or APP_MODE

  # 2. Set Path Constants
  APP_DIR              <- here::here()
  GLOBAL_DIR           <- file.path(APP_DIR, "scripts", "global_scripts")
  CONFIG_PATH          <- file.path(APP_DIR, "app_config.yaml")
  APP_DATA_DIR         <- file.path(APP_DIR, "data", "app_data")
  LOCAL_DATA_DIR       <- file.path(APP_DIR, "data", "local_data")
  # ... and more

  # 3. Load Database Paths
  # SourcesX_global_data/db_paths.R
  # Creates db_path_list in global environment

  # 4. Source Mode-Specific Initialization
  # UPDATE_MODE: sc_initialization_app_mode.R + sc_initialization_update_mode.R
  # GLOBAL_MODE: sc_initialization_update_mode.R
  # APP_MODE:    sc_initialization_app_mode.R

  # 5. Set Completion Flag
  INITIALIZATION_COMPLETED <- TRUE
}
```

## What autodeinit() Does

```r
autodeinit <- function() {
  # 1. Close All Database Connections
  if (exists("dbDisconnect_all")) {
    dbDisconnect_all()
  }

  # 2. Clear Global Environment
  objs <- ls(envir = .GlobalEnv, all.names = TRUE)
  objs <- setdiff(objs, c(".InitEnv"))  # Keep private environment
  rm(list = objs, envir = .GlobalEnv)

  # 3. Garbage Collection
  gc()

  # 4. Rebuild Thin Shell Wrappers
  assign("autoinit", function(...) .InitEnv$autoinit(...), envir = .GlobalEnv)
  assign("autodeinit", function(...) .InitEnv$autodeinit(...), envir = .GlobalEnv)

  # 5. Reset Mode Flag
  .InitEnv$mode <- NULL
}
```

## Operation Modes

| Mode | Detection | Initialized Scripts |
|------|-----------|---------------------|
| `UPDATE_MODE` | Parent dir is `update_scripts` | app_mode + update_mode |
| `GLOBAL_MODE` | Parent dir is `global_scripts` | update_mode only |
| `APP_MODE` | Default (e.g., Shiny app) | app_mode only |

## Best Practices

### 1. Always Source Explicitly

::: {.callout-important}
## Required for Rscript Execution
```r
# ALWAYS include this, even if .Rprofile exists
source("scripts/global_scripts/22_initializations/sc_Rprofile.R")
autoinit()
```
:::

### 2. autodeinit() Must Be Last

::: {.callout-warning}
## Position Matters
`autodeinit()` clears the global environment. Any code after it will fail.
```r
# CORRECT
message("Script complete")
autodeinit()

# WRONG - will fail
autodeinit()
message("This will error!")  # .GlobalEnv is cleared
```
:::

### 3. Wrapper Scripts Don't Need Init/Deinit

If a script only sources another script that already has `autoinit()`/`autodeinit()`:

```r
# cbz_D04_04.R (wrapper)
# NOTE: No autoinit/autodeinit needed - main script handles it
source("scripts/update_scripts/DRV/cbz/cbz_D04_02.R")
```

### 4. Track Connection Ownership

Only disconnect connections created by your script:

```r
# In PART 1
connection_created <- FALSE
if (!exists("con") || !inherits(con, "DBIConnection")) {
  con <- dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(), DB_PATH)
  connection_created <- TRUE
}

# In PART 5
if (connection_created && exists("con")) {
  dbDisconnect(con, shutdown = TRUE)
}
```

## Common Anti-Patterns

### 1. Relying Only on .Rprofile

::: {.callout-warning}
## Avoid
```r
# Bad: Assumes .Rprofile loaded
autoinit()  # Will fail in Rscript if .Rprofile not sourced
```
:::

### 2. Code After autodeinit()

::: {.callout-warning}
## Avoid
```r
# Bad: Code after deinit
autodeinit()
save_results()  # ERROR: environment cleared
```
:::

### 3. Missing autodeinit()

::: {.callout-warning}
## Avoid
```r
# Bad: No cleanup
autoinit()
# ... logic ...
# Script ends without autodeinit()
# Result: Database connections may leak
```
:::

## Connection to Principles

| Principle | Connection |
|-----------|------------|
| **[DM_R044](../../part1_principles/CH02_data_management/rules/DM_R044_derivation_implementation_standard.qmd)** | Five-part structure requires autoinit/autodeinit |
| **[MP107](../../part1_principles/CH00_fundamental_principles/04_data_management/MP107_etl_pipeline_independence.qmd)** | ETL independence via self-initialization |
| **[MP103](../../part1_principles/CH00_fundamental_principles/02_structure_organization/MP103_autodeinit_behavior.qmd)** | Autodeinit behavior specification |

## DRV Script Template

```r
#!/usr/bin/env Rscript
#####
# DERIVATION: {Name}
# VERSION: {X.Y}
# PLATFORM: {cbz|amz|eby|all}
# GROUP: D{nn}
# SEQUENCE: {seq}
# PURPOSE: {description}
# CONSUMES: {input tables}
# PRODUCES: {output tables}
# PRINCIPLE: DM_R044, MP064, {others}
#####
#{platform}_D{group}_{sequence}

# ==============================================================================
# PART 1: INITIALIZE
# ==============================================================================

source("scripts/global_scripts/22_initializations/sc_Rprofile.R")
autoinit()

library(duckdb)
library(dplyr)

error_occurred <- FALSE
test_passed <- FALSE
rows_processed <- 0
start_time <- Sys.time()

# ==============================================================================
# PART 2: MAIN
# ==============================================================================

tryCatch({
  # Main logic here
}, error = function(e) {
  message("ERROR: ", e$message)
  error_occurred <<- TRUE
})

# ==============================================================================
# PART 3: TEST
# ==============================================================================

if (!error_occurred) {
  tryCatch({
    # Validation tests here
    test_passed <- TRUE
  }, error = function(e) {
    test_passed <<- FALSE
  })
}

# ==============================================================================
# PART 4: SUMMARIZE
# ==============================================================================

end_time <- Sys.time()
message(sprintf("Status: %s", ifelse(test_passed, "SUCCESS", "FAILED")))
message(sprintf("Time: %.2f seconds", as.numeric(difftime(end_time, start_time, units = "secs"))))

# ==============================================================================
# PART 5: DEINITIALIZE
# ==============================================================================

autodeinit()  # MUST be LAST statement
```

## Summary

The `autoinit()`/`autodeinit()` pattern ensures:

1. **Consistent initialization** across all execution contexts
2. **Proper resource cleanup** (database connections, memory)
3. **Mode-aware configuration** (UPDATE_MODE, GLOBAL_MODE, APP_MODE)
4. **Compliance with DM_R044** five-part structure

Always explicitly source `sc_Rprofile.R` - never rely on `.Rprofile` alone for scripts that may run via `Rscript` or `{targets}`.
